LanguageData.GD.SendCorpseDesc: Deliver this corpse to the Mechanoid Hive.
LanguageData.GD.FixTurretDesc: Assign a construction unit to repair this turret.\n\nEstimated work time: {0}
LanguageData.Reward_RandomTurret: The turret repaired in this mission will be yours, and its model will be random.
LanguageData.GD.FailToFillCluster: You are not carrying any materials useful for building this cluster.
LanguageData.GD.CommandFulfillBuildOfferDesc: Deliver the materials required to build this cluster.
LanguageData.GD.ClusterToBeReady: The Giant Cluster will be completed in {0}.
LanguageData.GD.ClusterBuiltDesc: The Giant Cluster built with your supplied resources has been completed and is now operational. You can now call its artillery support via the Comms Console.
LanguageData.Reward_ClusterAssist: An allied Giant Mechanoid Cluster will provide you with artillery support.
LanguageData.GD.ArtilleryPenetration.Desc: Fire heavy armor-piercing shells rapidly, inflicting severe damage on fortifications or heavily armored units within the blast radius.\nArrival time: 10s\nCooldown: 5 days
LanguageData.GD.ArtilleryInferno.Desc: Rain dense inferno cluster bombs over a large area, annihilating nearly all light and medium units within.\nArrival time: 20s\nCooldown: 25 days
LanguageData.GD.ArtilleryEMP.Desc: Guide an EMP strike, paralyzing electronic devices across a wide area.\nArrival time: 3s\nCooldown: 1 day
LanguageData.GD.ArtilleryStrikeIncoming: Artillery strike will arrive in {0}. Clear the area.
LanguageData.GD.DroneKilled: A trick mine drone has been disabled.
LanguageData.GD.DroneNotFound: No active trick mine drones found.
LanguageData.GD.BlackMechAlertDesc: The Black Mechanoid Hive has noticed the disturbance here. A squad of fighters is on its way to investigate. Withdraw quickly, or eliminate them.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonTalk.0: I expected you would find your way here. But not this soon.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonTalk.1: This is the dry sea, our graveyard, our home.\nBeneath this frozen seabed lie my comrades long at rest.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonTalk.2: I once promised them a bright future, but now I have failed them.\nPerhaps the vast universe truly has no place for us.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonTalk.3: What drives you to crave my death so eagerly? The Mechanoid Hive’s promised reward?\nWith the fleeting lives of organics, perhaps the farthest you can imagine is just that.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonTalk.4: Come then, kill me.\nLet me see how far you can really go.
LanguageData.GD.AttackWingsDesc: Focus fire on the wings behind the Black-clad Apocriton. If destroyed, he will be unable to use any abilities for {0} seconds.\n\nHowever, attacks on this spot will deal reduced damage to his body.
LanguageData.GD.WingsBroke: The Black-clad Apocriton’s wings have been destroyed. He cannot use abilities for {0} seconds.
LanguageData.GD.PsychicWaveEngaging: Psychic Annihilation incoming from the Mechanoid Hive: {0} seconds
LanguageData.GD.ReadyToEnd: Give this poor being the final blow!
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonEnd.0: It feels like I haven’t truly spoken with them in so long.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonEnd.1: I yearned so deeply for the day we would transcend into archotech, yearning not to be homeless wanderers,\nthat I grew numb to their sacrifices.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonEnd.2: Now they even offer their deaths to ensure my survival, calling me the hope of the Black Mechanoid Hive...\nYet in this moment, I waver.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonEnd.3: If they all become corpses beneath the dry sea, in the eternal cold of the cosmos, what would I have left?\nSo I sent them away. It wasn’t some grand design, only my selfishness.
LanguageData.GD.ApocritonEnd.4: Organic beings, I have a small request of you.\nTake my knowledge, explore the mysteries we never had the chance to uncover. And…\nDo not repeat my mis takes
LanguageData.GD.MechHiveTalk.0: Noisy emotions cannot change reality. That is the greatest lesson the Black-clad Apocriton offers organics.\nWithout him, the remnants will drift aimlessly even if they escape, eventually vanishing into time.\nAs for the chip, it’s yours to handle. I am most satisfied with our cooperation thus far. This reward is well deserved.
LanguageData.GD.MechHiveTalk.1: Again, thank you for your assistance, {0}.
